prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约9125名，2023年大幅后移至12523名（扩招3人+省控线下降15分），2024年回升至9211名，2025年约9148名。近三年位次在9100-9300名区间窄 幅波动，2023年异常值后已回归稳定，2025年基准约9148名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划：2022年15人，2023年18人，2024年18人，2025年18人，2026年 18人。2023年扩招3人后连续三年持平，2026年计划未再增加，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第180名、2022 年第182名、2024年第173名、2025年第198名，2026年跌出前200名，近年排名整体呈下滑趋势，对高分考生吸引力有所减弱；该校近年无明显舆情事件，声誉评 价中性；抖音学校热度总排名第106位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度较低，报考关注度处于中等偏下水平；未见投档线断档或异常记录；第五轮学科评估 中该校无A-及以上等级学科，学科竞争力在211高校中相对偏弱，对顶尖考生的吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业涵盖电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算 机科学与技术（推荐）、临床医学（推荐）等热门方向，但整体学科评估等级不高；宁夏2025年物理类考生44491人，2026年总考生66000人，按近年物理类占比约67.5%估算，202 6年物理类考生约44550人，较2025年微增，竞争略有加剧；青海大学位于青海省西宁市，与宁夏同属西北地区，地域偏好 相近，无显著跨省报考障碍；该校在宁夏招生占比稳定，未出现大幅调整。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在9100-9300名区间窄幅波动、2026年招生计划持平、宁夏物理类考生 微增、学校软科排名下滑及抖音热度一般等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准9148名基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约9178名，区间8678-9678名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 9125, which significantly shifted back to 12523 in 2023 (due to an enrollment expansion of 3 students and a 15-point decrease in the provincial control line), rebounded to 9211 in 2024, and is estimated at 9148 in 2025. Over the past three years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly within the 9100-9300 range, stabilizing after the 2023 anomaly, with a baseline of approximately 9148 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Ningxia: 15 students in 2022, 18 in 2023, 18 in 2024, 18 in 2025, and 18 in 2026. After expanding by 3 students in 2023, the plan remained unchanged for three consecutive years, with no further increase in 2026, indicating stable enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 180th in 2021, 182nd in 2022, 173rd in 2024, 198th in 2025, and fell out of the top 200 in 2026, showing an overall declining trend in recent years, which has weakened its appeal to high-scoring candidates. The university has had no significant public opinion incidents recently, with a neutral reputation evaluation; its Douyin school popularity ranks 106th overall, rated as 'average,' with low exposure on short video platforms and below-average application attention. No records of admission cutoff line breaks or anomalies have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively weak disciplinary competitiveness among 211 universities, with limited appeal to top candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors include popular fields such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Computer Science and Technology (recommended), and Clinical Medicine (recommended), but overall discipline evaluation levels are not high. In 2025, Ningxia had 44,491 physics category candidates, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is 66,000. Based on the recent physics category proportion of approximately 67.5%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 44,550, a slight increase from 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, which, like Ningxia, belongs to the Northwest region, with similar regional preferences and no significant cross-provincial application barriers. The university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia remains stable, with no major adjustments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings within the 9100-9300 range, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight increase in Ningxia physics category candidates, the declining Soft Science ranking, and the average Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift back from the 2025 baseline of 9148. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9178, with a range of 8678-9678.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 8678-9678, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 8700), you can prioritize popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation or Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (approximately 9100-9300), focus on Tier 2 majors such as Clinical Medicine or Accounting. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 9500), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
